		# # # Renaming Loop
		random_owned = { 
			limit = { 
				owner = {
					NOT = {
						CLN = { 
							OR = {
								has_country_flag = rename_thirty_days
								has_country_flag = rename_two_months
								has_country_flag = rename_four_months
								has_country_flag = rename_six_months
							}
						}
					} 
				} 
			}
			owner = { CLN = { country_event = { id = 566777744 days = 365 } } } 
		}
		random_owned = { 
			limit = { 
				owner = { 
					CLN = { has_country_flag = rename_thirty_days }
					NOT = {
						CLN = {
							OR = {
								has_country_flag = rename_two_months
								has_country_flag = rename_four_months
								has_country_flag = rename_six_months	
							}
						}				
					} 
				} 
			}
			owner = { CLN = { country_event = { id = 566777744 days = 30 } } } 
		}
		random_owned = { 
			limit = { 
				owner = { 
					CLN = { has_country_flag = rename_two_months }
					NOT = {
						CLN = {
							OR = {
								has_country_flag = rename_thirty_days
								has_country_flag = rename_four_months
								has_country_flag = rename_six_months
							}
						}				
					} 
				} 
			}
			owner = { CLN = { country_event = { id = 566777744 days = 61 } } } 
		}
		random_owned = { 
			limit = { 
				owner = {
					CLN = { has_country_flag = rename_four_months }
					NOT = {
						CLN = { 
							OR = {
								has_country_flag = rename_thirty_days
